title: Jaden Lite
description: Jaden Lite is a lightweight performance mod pack combining the mods of Simply Optimised, Fabulously Optimized, Performium, and some of the mods I use along with some QoL addons.
body:
Jaden Lite is a lightweight performance mod pack combining the mods of Simply Optimised, Fabulously Optimized, and Performium, and some of the mods I use along with some QoL addons.
Why this modpack: Well, ignoring the fact that it has all the performance mods from Simply Optimised, Fabulously Optimized, and Performium, I can prove it works. On a 2012 MacBook I'm getting 5fps on Vanilla Minecraft. Then with Simply Optimised, Fabulously Optimized, or Performium, I keep getting 10fps. Then with this modpack, I'm getting 15fps, sometimes even 20! So this could bring a huge FPS boost.
